overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked industrial tunnel at night. The vehicle navigates wet roads illuminated by warm artificial lighting, transitioning from smooth asphalt to debris-filled rough terrain while decelerating significantly.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service tunnel with safety railings

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through the curved tunnel, navigating wet road conditions

entered.detail: rough industrial concrete wall with weathered texture running along the left side
silver metal guardrail with vertical posts separating the road from the right side
rain-soaked black asphalt with yellow dividing lines reflecting overhead lights
warm yellow-orange industrial lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
colorful spray paint markings on the concrete surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels at high speed through a narrow industrial tunnel. Concrete walls line the left side while metal safety railings run along the right. The wet asphalt reflects the warm artificial lighting from ceiling fixtures, and graffiti is visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled tunnel section with damaged road surface

events.description: vehicle decelerates rapidly from 60 km/h to 30 km/h approaching rough terrain and debris
road surface transitions from smooth asphalt to rough debris-covered ground with broken barriers

agents.ego_description: slowing down significantly to navigate the debris-filled road section and avoid obstacles on the right

entered.detail: scattered rubble and broken materials accumulated on the right side of the road
bushes and plants growing through the broken barrier on the right side
uneven dirt and gravel surface replacing the smooth asphalt
damaged and collapsed section of the safety railing

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows dramatically as the tunnel road deteriorates into a rough, debris-filled surface. Metal railings give way to broken barriers and overgrown vegetation on the right, while the concrete wall continues on the left. The speed drops significantly as the vehicle navigates the hazardous terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through an industrial tunnel that transforms from a high-speed corridor into a hazardous, debris-strewn path. It begins with the vehicle racing along smooth, wet asphalt, where warm ceiling lights reflect off the road and graffiti adorns the concrete walls. As the vehicle maintains its momentum, the polished surface suddenly deteriorates, forcing a dramatic deceleration. The scene then shifts as the metal safety railings on the right give way to broken barriers and encroaching overgrown vegetation. Finally, the camera slows to a crawl, navigating the rough, hazardous terrain while the concrete wall continues to line the left side of the tunnel.
